item.title: Micro-frontend with Cloudflare ESI
item.description: Explores ESI for dynamic injection of header and footer (as microfrontent) in a microsite architecture implemented with SSG

item.title: Improving CLS
item.description: Since entire site is pre-rendered, difference in layout between mobile/desktop causes higher CLS.

item.title: Static Site Generation (SSG)
item.description: Implementing different features and optimizations

item.title: Implementing Rollback in SSG with Cloudfront
item.description: Since entire site is pre-rendered, difference in layout between mobile/desktop causes higher CLS.

item.title: The Node.js Architecture
item.description: Node.js's single-threaded event loop and non-blocking I/O model, makes it a powerful platform for building scalable, high-performance, and real-time applications.

item.title: Critical Rendering Path
item.description: Understanding the Critical Rendering Path for web performance optimization

item.title: The Node.js Event Loop
item.description: Deep dive into nodejs event loop internals

item.title: Optimizing Content Delivery by Serving Pre-compressed content
item.description: Serving Pre-compressed content from CDN

item.title: Unveiling NGINX's Proxy Cache Lock for SSR-Generated Content
item.description: Saves compute cost by significantly reducing origin server load

item.title: Implementing Redirection for Static Sites
item.description: This blogs talks about handling redirects in Static Sites

item.title: V8 JavaScript Engine - Internals
item.description: JS Engine used by Chrome, Node.js, etc

item.title: Libuv Internals
item.description: libuv is a multi-platform support library with a focus on asynchronous I/O

item.title: Async Task Queue
item.description: An async task queue manages and controls the execution of asynchronous tasks, ensuring they run according to specified concurrency limits and order.

item.title: Better Error Handling in JavaScript / TypeScript
item.description: Making errors as first-class citizens in your async function response, inspired by Go. JS Now Try Statement (In Proposal Stage)

item.title: Exponential Backoff Retry Strategy
item.description: It is a technique where an application progressively increases the waiting time between retry attempts after a failed operation

item.title: LRU Implementation
item.description: Implement a in-memory cache in JS with LRU as cache-eviction policy

item.title: Length of a string
item.description: What you see is not always what you get! The length of "👩‍👩‍👦‍👦🌦️🧘🏻‍♂️" is 21. Let us explore why is it 21 and how to get 3.

item.title: Pub Sub Pattern Loose Decoupling
item.description: This pattern allows for better modularity and scalability by decoupling the event producers from the event consumers.

item.title: Switching HTTP Versions on browser
item.description: How and when browser decides to switch HTTP Versions

item.title: Playing Videos on the Web
item.description: Deep dive into the different ways to play videos on the web - Playing videos via file, using HTTP Range Requests and Adaptive Streaming like HLS and DASH. We also dive into supporting multiple languages (audio tracks).

item.title: Performance Testing With K6
item.description: Learn about how to use Grafana's K6 to do various Performance Testing
